stemHtml: Which of the following statements about respiration is true?

options.a: External respiration uses air from outside of the aircraft, internal respiration uses recirculated air from inside.
options.b: Internal respiration is the transfer of O<sub>2</sub> and C<sub>O2</sub> into and out of the body’s cells.
options.c: Internal respiration is the exchange of O<sub>2</sub> and C<sub>O2</sub> in the capillaries of the lungs.
options.d: Internal respiration is exchange of the gases O<sub>2</sub> and C<sub>O2</sub> in the alveoli.
